name: Southern Lakes
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Wisconsin and Illinois since 1935, offering checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and student loans with NCUA insurance protection.
description_long:
Southern Lakes Credit Union was founded in 1935 when ten individuals pooled resources to help each other achieve financial success. As a member-owned financial cooperative, it operates as a community-chartered credit union headquartered in Kenosha, Wisconsin, with a mission to develop lifelong relationships that enhance members' personal and financial success while improving the communities it serves.

Southern Lakes offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, mortgages, auto loans, lifestyle signature loans, Kwik Cash lines of credit, share-secured loans, recreational loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC), student loans, and credit cards. The institution emphasizes personalized lending with member-oriented lenders who tailor solutions to individual financial goals. All deposits are federally insured by the NCUA, providing protection for member accounts.

The credit union distinguishes itself through its community focus, serving individuals living or working in six Wisconsin counties (Kenosha, Racine, Walworth, Milwaukee, Rock, and Waukesha) and two Illinois counties (Lake and McHenry). Its 91-year history demonstrates stability and long-term commitment to the communities it serves. The organization highlights personal touch in mortgage lending and simplicity in the loan application process, supported by online services and multiple contact channels including telephone teller services and a dedicated routing number.

As a not-for-profit cooperative, Southern Lakes operates with member interests prioritized over shareholder profits. However, the website provides limited detail on specific rates, terms, fees, or comparison data against competitors. Prospective members should verify membership eligibility requirements and confirm current product offerings, as detailed pricing and APR information is not publicly displayed on the available website content.
services: Credit cards with EMV and mobile purchasing
Loan payments and financial services management
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection on all deposits
91-year operating history dating to 1935 demonstrates institutional stability
Serves six Wisconsin and two Illinois counties with broad geographic membership eligibility
Member-owned cooperative structure prioritizes member interests over profits
Diverse loan products including auto, recreational, HELOC, and student loans
Personalized mortgage lending with stated emphasis on personal touch
Established community focus with Youth Zone and community programs mentioned
Multiple service channels including phone teller (800-924-1TNT) and online access
cons: Website lacks transparent pricing, APR ranges, or fee schedules for comparison
Limited membership eligibility—restricted to residents/workers in specific Wisconsin and Illinois counties only
No online account opening process described or visible on website
Minimal information on credit card features beyond EMV chip and mobile purchasing
Loan application details sparse; 'APPLY NOW' buttons lack estimated timeline or approval criteria
best_for: Residents and employees in Kenosha, Racine, Walworth, Milwaukee, Rock, or Waukesha counties in Wisconsin
Residents and employees in Lake or McHenry counties in Illinois
Members seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts with personalized mortgage and lending services
Borrowers interested in diverse loan products including auto, recreational, and home equity financing
diagnosis: Southern Lakes Credit Union is best for consumers living or working in its service areas (six Wisconsin and two Illinois counties) who value stability, NCUA protection, and personalized service from a member-owned institution. The main caveat is that membership is geographically restricted, and the website does not provide transparent rate or fee information needed for meaningful comparison with competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Southern Lakes — Credit Union in KENOSHA, WI | CreditDoc
meta_description: Southern Lakes — NCUA-insured credit union in KENOSHA, WI. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
